title: Adventure Minimalistic
description: Vanilla style modpack for Minecraft relax
body:
# Vanilla Style ModPack for Minecraft Relax
### Containing Mods that:
- Add New Structures, Biomes to explore
- Add New Items, Decorating and Functional Blocks
- Improve UI&GUI making it more convenient to use
- Create deep sound atmosphere 
- Add some Utilities for Surviving
